title: Simply Wormhole Pots
description: An addon for two mods that adds "Friendly Teleport" loot to the "Simply Pots" pots loot table.
body:
This mod will make it easier for you to get teleportation items from the "_**Friendly Teleport**_" to teleport to your friends by making you able to find them in the "_**Simply Pots**_" pots.

The rarer and  the pot is, the better will be the chance for you to get wormhole eyes and wormhole potions.

To know more about the 2 mods used you can go to their page with the links below. 

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/friendly-teleport

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simply-pots
